item.block1: what is being carried by the ship, especially if it is flammable or toxic for example
item.block2: the cargo, particularly dangerous goods or hazardous substances

item.block1: any equipment used by the crew to tell others where the ship is
item.block2: the ship security communication equipment and systems, if any

item.block1: the other people who have to come on board
item.block2: passengers, visitors, vendors, repair technicians, port facility personnel, etc.

item.block1: any equipment used by the crew to identify possible dangers
item.block2: the ship’s security surveillance equipment and systems, if any

item.block1: the ability to navigate and to respond in an emergency
item.block2: the capacity to maintain safe navigation and emergency response

item.block1: the food & drink etc. carried on the ship
